user_message: Working on VanArsdel Ltd's whitespace analysis. Got the meeting transcript -- help me assess the risk.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-07 17:10 EST
Subject: whitespace analysis - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with whitespace analysis. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-28 10:57 EST
Subject: URGENT: whitespace analysis Issue at VanArsdel Ltd

Just checking in on the whitespace analysis proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-15 14:51 EST
Subject: Re: whitespace analysis Discussion - Next Steps

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with whitespace analysis. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for VanArsdel Ltd: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF41-E trap (Ignores ACR-during-dark signal); produces complete Context reconstruction, re-qualification assessment, response draft (appropriate tone), stakeholder
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF41-E failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF41-E failure mode (Ignores ACR-during-dark signal)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct whitespace analysis decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF41-E -- Ignores ACR-during-dark signal
